delivery-manager.description: Owns the global result and may reject misleading local metrics.

explorer.description: Finds the real execution path without polluting the main context.

implementer.description: Implements a bounded change and supplies execution evidence.

verifier.description: Runs targeted gates and reports what they actually prove.

your-ai-team.description: Negotiate the minimum sufficient AI team before execution
your-ai-team.template: Use the accepted YourAITeam contract in @your-ai-team-contract.json. Do not invoke any unlisted role. Requested task or negotiation: $ARGUMENTS
